name: Fruit Salad Rice Dessert
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the fruit cocktail, reserving the liquid.
2. Add enough water to the reserved liquid to make a total of 1 cup.
3. Place this mixture in a 1 1/2 quart casserole dish and cover with wax paper.
4. Microwave at high (100%) until the liquid boils for 2 1/2 to 3 minutes.
5. Stir in the rice and sugar. Cover and let stand for 10 to 12 minutes.
6. Stir in the fruit cocktail and nuts, then chill.
7. Just before serving, fold in the Cool Whip.
Makes 6 servings.
